summary: Tested mandatory admin verification video feature for product submissions. All backend APIs passed (14/14 tests). Frontend UI verified - seller Add Product modal shows mandatory admin video upload section. Fixed security issue where admin_video was exposed to non-admin users.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed products for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin verification video feature is fully functional. The admin_video field is now properly hidden from non-admin users in product details API. Seller Add Product modal shows mandatory video upload section with orange/red gradient button.

backend_apis.POST /api/products (with admin_video): PASS - Product created with admin_video field
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/products/pending: PASS - Returns pending products with admin_video for admin
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/products/{id}/approve: PASS - Admin can approve product with video
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/products/{id}/reject: PASS - Admin can reject product with video
backend_apis.GET /api/products/seller/my-products: PASS - Seller can see their products with admin_video

frontend_ui.seller_add_product_modal: PASS - Shows mandatory admin video section
frontend_ui.admin_video_upload_button: PASS - Orange/red gradient button '📹 ارفع فيديو التحقق'
frontend_ui.admin_only_notice: PASS - Shows 'هذا الفيديو للأدمن فقط ولن يظهر للعملاء'
frontend_ui.admin_pending_products_tab: PASS - PendingProductsTab component has video modal

security_fix_applied.issue: admin_video was exposed to non-admin users in GET /api/products/{id}
security_fix_applied.fix: Added product.pop('admin_video', None) for non-admin users in get_product endpoint
